name: Chocolate Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Margarine (2 sticks), at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, dry sugar substitute (if using), cinnamon, and salt.
2. Add margarine, eggs, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
3. Pour batter into an 11" x 15" jelly roll pan that has been sprayed with pan spray or greased with margarine.
4. Bake at 325°F for 20-25 minutes, or until bars pull away from the sides of the pan and a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the hot bars.
6. Allow chocolate to set before cutting into bars. Cut as desired.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 14g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 7g; CAL: 123
